title: Vežba 84

questions.text: David voli predlog Anne, ali je zabrinut. Šta će reći?

answers.answer: That's interesting, so I will definitely implement it immediately.
answers.feedback: David ana wasiwasi, kwa hivyo hatakubali kutekeleza mara moja.

answers.answer: That's a good suggestion, but I'm not sure I'd find much support for implementing it.

dialogue.text: How about trying some of those in your company?

instructions: Slušajte audio odgovor na pitanje ispod.
explanation:
That's a good suggestion, but... predstavlja način prihvatanja ideje uz izražavanje zabrinutosti. Ova izjava omogućava poštovan dijalog, ostavljajući prostor za nastavak razgovora o toj zabrinutosti. Na primer:

  • Razvijatelj: How about we use this new software to improve productivity?

  • Šef tima: That's a good suggestion, but we should check if it's compatible with our current systems. - Ova osoba prihvaća ideju, ali pokazuje problem potencijalnog neslaganja.
